Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: She sizes you up. Whatever she sees in meantime brings an unsettling grin to her face.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: What do you know about working hard? You're neither self-made nor otherwise.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: I know that you're trying to mock me, but it'd be more effective if it didn't come off like a shrub calling a fern short.

Line.Text: Not that that's what's going on. That would imply that we are on the same level, which we most definitely aren't.
